sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f positioning: Calculate expected trades (N) needed to reach wealth goal using geometric mean returns. Use fractional Kelly (0.2f, 0.1f, 0.05f) to reduce variance from full optimal f (GHPR 1.01933). Adjust position size inversely to risk proportional to selected Kelly fraction.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f positioning by calculating the expected number of trades needed to reach a specific wealth goal based on geometric mean returns and active equity percentage.
